metadata.title: AKS Kubernetes
metadata.description: Comprehensive collection of Azure Kubernetes Service resources, featuring production-ready Stacks for rapid deployment and modular Atomics for custom architectural control. This group provides a complete toolkit for building, scaling, and securing your Azure containerized infrastructure according to cloud best practices.
metadata.subtitle: Azure Stacks & Atomics

configuration.title: Containers & Components
configuration.description: Comprehensive collection of Azure containerized deployment templates. This group offers two distinct sections: 'Select a Configuration' with complete ready-to-deploy container solutions for non-production and production environments, and 'Building Blocks' with container-related components for users building custom containerized architectures.
